query: SELECT e.id, e.codigoInterno, e.nomeCompleto, e.companyId, c.razaoSocial, c.prefixoCodigo FROM employees e LEFT JOIN companies c ON e.companyId = c.id WHERE e.codigoInterno IN ('EMP001', 'EMP002', 'EMP003', 'EMP004', 'EMP005')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT e.id, e.codigoInterno, e.nomeCompleto, e.companyId, c.razaoSocial, c.prefixoCodigo FROM employees e LEFT JOIN companies c ON e.companyId = c.id WHERE e.codigoInterno IN ('EMP001', 'EMP002', 'EMP003', 'EMP004', 'EMP005')
